commands.summary: Built backend and renderer, ran renderer tests, backend database/server tests, migrations, Twilio tests, and Electron syntax checks. Added coverage for channel credential hashing, export redaction, invalid credentials, disabled and revoked channels, urgent rate limits, and Settings redaction.
Verified the MCP bridge sends a separate channel token for message creation and templates include channel token files.
Verified the Fabric smoke still creates an approval and observes the action outcome using separate MCP and channel token files.
Captured Electron/dist/ui-preview.png after Settings UI channel credential changes.
Repository governance validation passed after moving 007 to completed.

environment.rate_limit_policy: Fixed 60-second window per channel and urgency: low=60, normal=30, high=10, urgent=3.
environment.redaction_note: Agent channel credentials are returned only once from launch-token-only admin endpoints, written to local token files by the desktop process, stored as SHA-256 hashes in SQLite, excluded from JSON export, and not rendered in Settings or evidence.
